# freeipa_dns_zone (Data Source)

Reads details of a FreeIPA DNS Zone.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `zone_name` (String) The name of the DNS zone.

### Read-Only

- `admin_email` (String) Administrator e-mail address.
- `allow_query` (String) Semicolon-separated list of IP addresses or networks allowed to issue queries.
- `allow_sync_ptr` (Boolean) Allow synchronization of forward and reverse records.
- `allow_transfer` (String) Semicolon-separated list of IP addresses or networks allowed to transfer the zone.
- `authoritative_nameserver` (String) Authoritative nameserver.
- `default_ttl` (Number) Default time to live for records without an explicit TTL.
- `dynamic_update` (Boolean) Allow dynamic updates.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the DNS zone is enabled/active.
- `expire` (Number) SOA record expire time.
- `forward_policy` (String) Forwarding policy: only, first, none.
- `forwarders` (Set of String) List of DNS forwarders.
- `id` (String) Unique zone name.
- `minimum` (Number) How long negative responses should be cached.
- `refresh` (Number) SOA record refresh time.
- `retry` (Number) SOA record retry time.
- `ttl` (Number) Time to live for records at the zone apex.
